bio: I’m **Kyle De Vares**, a multidisciplinary digital designer and creative developer with a passion for bold visuals, branding, illustration, and experimental digital projects. My work blends creativity with technology, combining design thinking, storytelling, and technical problem-solving to create engaging visual experiences.

With a background in Computer Science and Digital Media, I enjoy working across both creative and technical spaces, from branding and graphic design to creative coding, digital art, and interactive ideas. I’m especially drawn to projects that allow me to experiment, explore new styles, and push my skills further through hands-on learning and creative challenges.

Alongside freelance commissions and independent creative work, I’ve developed experience in web development, digital content creation, branding, and collaborative project work. During my internship at IPOP Digitals, I worked on responsive websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, and Agile workflows, helping build and maintain projects while strengthening both my development and teamwork skills.

Outside of design and coding, I’m heavily inspired by gaming, music, storytelling, online communities, fashion, and alternative visual culture. Whether I’m creating artwork, sewing, exploring new creative techniques, or experimenting with digital ideas, I’m always looking for ways to evolve both creatively and professionally.

I’m currently seeking opportunities where I can continue growing as a designer, contribute to meaningful creative projects, and collaborate with teams that value creativity, experimentation, and fresh ideas

timeline.detail:
Developed and maintained responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Worked within Agile workflows, participating in team meetings and progress updates.
Used Git for version control and collaborated with developers on live projects.
Performed testing, debugging, and improvements to enhance website performance and usability.
Contributed to documentation and project handovers.

timeline.event: Computer Science & Digital Media Studies — University College Jersey
timeline.detail:
Completed BSc (HONS) in Computer Science alongside Higher National Diploma & Certificate in Digital Media.
Combined technical development (coding, systems, IT) with creative digital media practice.
Explored web development, interactive design, and visual storytelling projects.
Built foundation in both creative design thinking and technical problem-solving.

timeline.event: IT Service Desk Assistant (Placement) — States of Jersey / M&D
timeline.detail:
Provided IT support, including password resets and user account management via Active Directory.
Assisted staff with technical troubleshooting, system setup, and hardware maintenance.
Rebuilt laptops and installed software for operational use and remote working.
Monitored systems and inboxes for potential cybersecurity issues including malware and phishing threats.

timeline.event: Event: Creative Digital Media & IT Studies (Games Design) — Highlands College Jersey
timeline.detail:
Studied BTEC Level 2 IT & Computing followed by BTEC Creative Digital Media.
Developed early skills in digital design, branding, and visual content creation.
Built foundational understanding of creative software and technical systems.
